status_code_meaning: Account not provisioned or not enrolled for EMS Collect Data submissions
message: statusCode=-16 returned for ALL EMS submissions including untouched official NEMSIS TAC EMS Allergy and HeatStroke files

cross_validation_evidence.conclusion: DEM accepts same credentials. EMS rejects with -16. This is account enrollment/provisioning, not credential or data issue.
